Name: Portal Brasileiro de Dados Abertos (dados.gov.br)
What You Can Get: Master federal catalog: search/list datasets, organizations, tags across all federal bodies (CKAN). Best single entry point to discover any federal dataset.
Limitations: Indexes metadata; data lives on agency portals. Coverage uneven by agency.

Name: Base dos Dados (BD)
Access Method: BigQuery SQL + Python/R/Stata pkgs + CSV download
What You Can Get: Hundreds of cleaned, cross-joinable public datasets (IBGE, RAIS, Comex, SIM, PIB) in one datalake with consistent municipality keys. Massively cuts ETL time.
Limitations: Mirror not primary; not all official tables present; >1TB/mo query incurs Google cost.

Name: IPEAdata
API/Docs: http://www.ipeadata.gov.br/api/odata4/ (OData v4); R ipeadatar; Python ipeadatapy
What You Can Get: Thousands of macro, regional and social time series (GDP & state GDP, IPCA, IGP, FX, Gini, poverty) curated from primary sources, queryable by code.
Limitations: Aggregates multiple primary sources; some series lag. Always cite original source for audits.

Name: Portal da Transparência (Federal)
What You Can Get: Federal expenses, revenue, transfers (incl. to municipalities), servant salaries, sanctioned firms (CEIS/CNEP), social benefits, corporate cards, emendas.
Limitations: API rate-limited; for large volumes use bulk CSV.

Name: SICONFI
What You Can Get: Accounting & fiscal reports (RREO, RGF, DCA) + Matriz de Saldos Contabeis for all 5,570 municipalities + states: revenue, expense, debt, by entity/period.
Limitations: Self-reported; gaps where entities don't submit; retroactive revisions common.

Name: Tesouro Transparente
What You Can Get: Budget execution dashboards, public debt, Tesouro Direto bond prices/yields, federal cost system (SIC), fiscal statistics.
Limitations: Some panels aggregated; for rawer structured data use SICONFI.

Name: TransfereGov / Transferências Abertas
What You Can Get: Federal voluntary transfers, convênios, contratos de repasse to states/municipalities/NGOs: values, status, executors.
Limitations: Legacy Siconv vs modern contracts need manual entity joins. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: Siga Brasil
What You Can Get: Full federal budget (LOA): authorization vs execution by organ/function/program/action; emendas parlamentares.
Limitations: Interface heavy; learning curve.

Name: Portal da Transparência - Acre
What You Can Get: Receitas, despesas, convênios, contratos, servidores, repasses a municípios.
Limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

Name: Portal da Transparência - Alagoas
What You Can Get: Orçamento, receitas, despesas, repasses, pessoal, licitações, patrimônio, convênios. Has API/WebService.
Limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

Name: Portal da Transparência - Amapá
What You Can Get: Despesas, pessoal, emendas, áreas setoriais do Executivo.
Limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: Portal da Transparência - Amazonas
What You Can Get: Execução orçamentária/financeira, pagamentos por credor, pessoal. (2026 payroll inconsistency notice.)

What You Can Get: Execução financeira, servidores, convênios.

Limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker timed out; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

What You Can Get: Convênios, licitações, receita, despesa, saúde, educação.
Limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping.

What You Can Get: Servidores, remuneração, receitas, despesas, contratos.

Name: Portal da Transparência - Rio Branco
What You Can Get: Obras, despesas, contratações, receitas, pessoal.
Limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping.

Name: PNCP - Portal Nacional de Contratações Públicas
What You Can Get: National registry of public bids, contracts, price records (atas), procurement plans across all government levels (Lei 14.133).
Limitations: Municipal adoption still ramping; older contracts in Comprasnet. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: Compras.gov.br (Dados Abertos)
What You Can Get: Federal purchases: biddings, contracts, suppliers, catalog items/prices (CATMAT/CATSER), supplier base (SICAF).
Limitations: Legacy endpoints; migrating to PNCP. High-volume API throttled.

Name: Painel de Preços
What You Can Get: Historic reference prices in public purchases. NOTE: official source reported update interruption from Jul/2025 - use with caution.
Limitations: Discontinued for current benchmarking.

Name: IBGE - API de Dados Agregados (SIDRA)
Access Method: API (REST v3) + web query builder + sidrapy/sidrar
What You Can Get: All IBGE survey tables: Census, population, IPCA/INPC, PIB municipal, PAM/PPM (agro/livestock), PNAD, industry/retail/services. Multidimensional filtering.
Limitations: Need correct table (agregado) code; census-tract queries may be chunked.

Name: IBGE - APIs de Serviços (Localidades, Malhas, CNAE, Nomes)
What You Can Get: Administrative divisions & codes, territorial mesh maps (multiple resolutions), CNAE classification, place names (BNGB), census first-names.

Name: IBGE Cidades / Panorama
What You Can Get: Per-municipality dashboards: population, area, GDP, education, health, territory in one profile.
Limitations: Presentation layer over SIDRA; use SIDRA/API for automation.

Name: SEADE Repositório / Municípios / População SP
What You Can Get: SP population & projections, fertility/vital stats, employment, education, health, economy at fine geography. IPVS vulnerability index.
Limitations: SP-only; layouts vary by dataset.

Name: IJSN - Instituto Jones dos Santos Neves
What You Can Get: ES analytical center: receitas, dengue, violence, conjuntura, regional indicators. Some data in Dados ES portal.
Limitations: Split between own panels and Dados ES.

Name: Fundação João Pinheiro - Estatísticas Públicas
What You Can Get: MG state & municipal GDP, sectoral value added, trade indicators, input-output matrices; R&D/patent/publication indexes.
Limitations: Some stats rely on slow academic disclosure. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: SEI Bahia - Superintendência de Estudos Econômicos e Sociais
What You Can Get: Bahia statistical/economic output: conjuntura, PIB, mercado de trabalho, thematic publications.
Limitations: Easier via publications/panels than raw datasets.

Name: IPARDES - BDEweb (Base de Dados do Estado)
What You Can Get: Physical, economic, social, financial & administrative indicators for all 399 PR municipalities; PIB, IDH, IPDM, emprego.
Limitations: Consolidated indicators, not transactional data.

Name: PDET - Microdados RAIS / CAGED / Novo CAGED
Access Method: FTP bulk download (or Base dos Dados mirror)
What You Can Get: Non-identified microdata of every formal employment bond: hires/separations, wages, CNAE, occupation (CBO), tenure, demographics by municipality.
Limitations: FTP not browser-supported (use FileZilla); identified data needs sigilo agreement. Caged-old vs Novo Caged methodology break.

Name: BCB - SGS (Séries Temporais)
What You Can Get: ~20k+ series: Selic, CDI, FX, IPCA, credit stock/rates, monetary aggregates, balance of payments, by numeric series code.
Limitations: Date range per call <=10y; need series codes.

Name: BCB - Portal de Dados Abertos (Olinda)
What You Can Get: PIX statistics (incl. municipal), Open Finance, IFData (bank balance sheets), means-of-payment, PTAX FX, institutions registry, Focus expectations, credit.
Limitations: Each service has own OData endpoint; check resource & license.

Name: CVM - Dados Abertos
What You Can Get: Listed-company filings (ITR/DFP), investment funds daily quotas & portfolios, regulated entities, informes diários FI.
Limitations: Flat-file model; large files by theme directory.

Name: B3 - Cotações Históricas / Market Data
What You Can Get: End-of-day historical quotes (free), indices (Ibovespa); real-time/tick data is commercial.
Limitations: Most granular & real-time data paywalled.

Name: Receita Federal - CNPJ Dados Abertos
What You Can Get: Complete registry of all Brazilian companies: name, CNAE, address, status, partners (QSA), capital, Simples/MEI flags. ~60M+ establishments, 160M+ records.
Limitations: 20GB+; needs ETL/DB. No transactional API (use 3rd-party APIs). No graph API for beneficial ownership.

Name: Receita Federal - Dados Abertos (geral)
What You Can Get: Beyond CNPJ: Simples Nacional/MEI lists, immune/exempt entities, customs data, tax-collection stats, CAFIR (rural properties).

Name: Mapa de Empresas
What You Can Get: Panels on company openings, closures, stock, time-to-open, business environment dynamics.
Limitations: Analytical panel; for microdata use CNPJ/Juntas.

Name: Juntas Comerciais (diretório DREI)
What You Can Get: National directory of state Juntas Comerciais (index to find the competent junta per UF).
Limitations: Directory, not a registry DB; data fragmented across 27 juntas.

Name: Junta Comercial - JUCESP
API/Docs: service portal; mostly no open API
What You Can Get: Company registrations, branches, nature/sector/location of new SP businesses.
Limitations: Service-oriented; partner detail often paid; not bulk-friendly.

Name: Junta Comercial - JUCEAC
API/Docs: service portal; mostly no open API
What You Can Get: Mercantile registry & Redesim integration in Acre.
Limitations: Service-oriented; partner detail often paid; not bulk-friendly.

Name: Junta Comercial - JUCAP
API/Docs: service portal; mostly no open API
What You Can Get: Junta comercial services & process consultation in Amapá.
Limitations: Service-oriented; partner detail often paid; not bulk-friendly. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: Junta Comercial - JUCEB
API/Docs: service portal; mostly no open API
What You Can Get: Business registry & digital services in Bahia.
Limitations: Service-oriented; partner detail often paid; not bulk-friendly.

Name: Junta Comercial - JUCEMG
API/Docs: service portal; mostly no open API
What You Can Get: Company opening/alteration/registration of acts in MG.
Limitations: Service-oriented; partner detail often paid; not bulk-friendly.

Name: Junta Comercial - JUCERJA
API/Docs: service portal; mostly no open API
What You Can Get: Web protocol, simplified certificate, registration of acts in RJ.
Limitations: Service-oriented; partner detail often paid; not bulk-friendly.

Name: Comex Stat
Granularity: NCM x country x UF x municipality (declarant) x mode
What You Can Get: Official exports/imports: FOB value, net kg, quantity, by product (NCM/SH4), partner, state, municipality of declaring firm, transport, customs unit.
Limitations: Municipality = firm's fiscal domicile, not production origin; bulk CSVs too large for spreadsheets. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: SEFAZ-PR - Receita Tributária
What You Can Get: ICMS, IPVA, ITCMD collections, federal transfers, tax waivers by municipality (PR).
Limitations: Tax-label structural changes in 2024.

Name: INCRA - Acervo Fundiário (SIGEF/SNCI geo)
What You Can Get: Certified rural property boundaries (public & private), agrarian-reform settlements, quilombola territories as GIS layers.
Limitations: Servers unstable; some downloads now behind gov.br.

Name: SIGEF - Sistema de Gestão Fundiária
What You Can Get: Georeferencing certification of rural properties, parcel coordinates/vertices, certification status.
Auth Required: gov.br prata/ouro for full consult; cert for operation
Limitations: Focus on certification, not all cadastres.

Name: SICAR / CAR - Cadastro Ambiental Rural
API/Docs: public consult + SHP per municipality/UF; Conecta API (gov-only OAuth)
Access Method: web consult + SHP download (+ Conecta API for gov)
What You Can Get: Self-declared rural property boundaries, legal reserve, APP, land-use polygons (~6M+ properties). Query by CPF/CNPJ via Conecta (restricted).
Limitations: Self-declared, overlaps common; raw bulk via download, not open API.

Name: SNCR - Sistema Nacional de Cadastro Rural (API)
What You Can Get: Query rural property status, by code or owner CPF/CNPJ; download CCIR; titularity, fiscal modules, classification.
Limitations: Built for institutional integration.

Name: Meu Imóvel Rural
What You Can Get: Unified view of a holder's properties across CAR+SNCR+SIGEF, georeferenced; download CCIR, CAR receipt.
Limitations: Only logged-in owner's own properties.

Name: ONR - Registradores (cartórios de imóveis)
What You Can Get: Property registry certificates (matrícula), prior search, e-protocol across participating registry offices nationwide.
License/Terms: Paid per act; not open data
Limitations: Fees apply; coverage depends on cartório participation. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: MAPA - Dados Abertos (Agrofit, SIGSIF, etc.)
What You Can Get: Registered pesticides (Agrofit), federally inspected plants (SIGSIF/SISBI), agric. defense, seed/cultivar registries, zoning.
Limitations: Spread across many subsystems.

Name: CONAB - Informações Agropecuárias
What You Can Get: Crop forecasts (safras), supply/stocks, minimum prices (PGPM), production costs, market price series.

Name: CEPEA/ESALQ-USP - Indicadores de Preços
What You Can Get: Benchmark daily price indicators (cattle, soy, corn, coffee, sugar) widely used in contracts.
Limitations: Not government; attribution required. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: INPE - TerraBrasilis (PRODES/DETER)
What You Can Get: Official deforestation polygons & rates (PRODES), near-real-time alerts (DETER), by biome & Legal Amazon. BiomasBR program.
Limitations: Attend to 'PRODES year' & per-program methodology.

Name: INPE - Programa Queimadas / BDQueimadas
What You Can Get: Active fire foci & burned-area products for Brazil & Latin America, spatial & temporal series.
Limitations: Satellite focus != confirmed surface fire.

Name: MapBiomas
Domain: Land use & land cover / fire / water
What You Can Get: Annual land-cover/use maps (1985+), deforestation & regeneration, fire scars, water surface, mining, by pixel/municipality/biome.
Limitations: Classification not ground truth; NGO (not official).

Name: ANA - SNIRH / HidroWeb
What You Can Get: River flow/level, rainfall, water quality, reservoir levels, water-use grants, by station & basin.
Limitations: Station data needs consistency treatment.

Name: INMET - BDMEP
What You Can Get: Historical & automatic weather-station data: temperature, rainfall, humidity, wind, pressure; forecasts/warnings.
Limitations: Station metadata/standardization to check.

Name: IBAMA - Dados Abertos (embargos, autuações)
What You Can Get: Embargoed areas, fines/infractions, deforestation authorizations; cross-referencable with CAR/SIGEF.

Name: GeoSGB - Serviço Geológico do Brasil
What You Can Get: Geology, hydrogeology, geophysics, geotechnics, risk/disaster maps in official geospatial environment.
Limitations: Multiple bases with distinct scales/coverage.

Name: INDE - Infraestrutura Nacional de Dados Espaciais
What You Can Get: Federated catalog of official geospatial layers from dozens of producers (IBGE, INCRA, ANA, ICMBio); discovery + OGC services.
Limitations: Metadata quality varies.

Name: IBGE - Downloads Geociências / Malhas / Geodésico
What You Can Get: Geology, relief, biomes, cartography, territorial meshes (UF/município/setor), geodesic network — base layers for geocoding & maps.
Limitations: Watch boundary changes for temporal comparability.

Name: Geoportal IDE Bahia
What You Can Get: Official Bahia spatial-data infrastructure catalog; metadata search for state geospatial layers.
Limitations: Catalog/service; extraction depends on associated service.

Name: GeoSampa
What You Can Get: Full municipal GIS: cadastral lots, zoning, IPTU value zones, street network, transport, geology, environment layers.
Limitations: - Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: BHMap Geoserver
What You Can Get: BH spatial layers: zoning boundaries, hydrography, transport nodes, hazard mapping.
Limitations: Best via QGIS/ArcGIS for full vectors.

Name: Geoweb Vitória
What You Can Get: Apps, panels, maps & geographic data for managing the ES capital.
Limitations: Not all layers directly downloadable from home.

Name: DATASUS - TabNet
What You Can Get: Mortality (SIM), births (SINASC), notifiable diseases (SINAN), hospital/ambulatory production (SIH/SIA), immunization, by municipality.
Limitations: Legacy DBC format; TabNet UI dated; PySUS eases access.

Name: DATASUS - Transferência de Arquivos
What You Can Get: Raw historical files for SIM, SINASC, SIH, CNES etc. for robust ETL.
Limitations: Legacy formats need conversion.

Name: DATASUS - FTP S3 Mirror (community)
URL: various S3 mirrors (e.g. via microdatasus R pkg)
What You Can Get: High-speed mirror of SIM/SINASC/SIH/CNES with parallel sync & transaction logs.
Limitations: Community-maintained (not official); needs DBC parsers.

Name: CNES - Estabelecimentos de Saúde
What You Can Get: Every health facility (public & private): type, beds, equipment, services, professionals, location. Core for healthcare-enablement mapping.
Limitations: Name/unit normalization needed; known cadastral inconsistencies.

Name: DATASUS - API Dados Abertos
What You Can Get: Modern REST endpoints over selected health datasets (CNES, professionals, some epidemiology) without TabNet.
Limitations: Coverage narrower than full DATASUS.

Name: ANS - Dados Abertos (saúde suplementar)
What You Can Get: Health-plan operators registry & financials, beneficiary counts by operator/municipality/plan, TISS, complaints.
Limitations: Personal microdata not public.

Name: ANVISA - Dados Abertos
What You Can Get: Registered medicines/cosmetics/food, drug prices (CMED), adverse events, establishment authorizations, imports.
Limitations: - Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: INEP - Microdados (hub)
What You Can Get: Hub for all INEP microdata: Censo Escolar, ENEM, Higher-Ed Census, SAEB, plus dictionaries & questionnaires.
Limitations: Anonymization limits some individual cross-joins; large files.

Name: INEP - Censo Escolar (microdados)
What You Can Get: Enrollments, schools, classes, teachers, basic-ed infrastructure indicators by school/municipality.
Limitations: Variables change over time; check annual layouts.

Name: INEP - ENEM / Censo Ed. Superior / IDEB
What You Can Get: ENEM scores/items/questionnaires; Higher-Ed Census (IES, courses, faculty, vacancies); IDEB results & targets by network/municipality.
Limitations: Recent ENEM simplified for data protection.

Name: CAPES - Dados Abertos / Catálogo de Teses
What You Can Get: Grad-program evaluation, theses/dissertations catalog, scholarships, production, by program/institution/area.
Limitations: Very heterogeneous across datasets. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: CNJ - DataJud (API Pública)
What You Can Get: Public metadata for judicial cases nationwide: class, subject, court, movements (excludes sealed cases & party personal data).
Limitations: Per-tribunal endpoints; metadata only; bulk raw-event consumption limited.

Name: CNJ - Justiça em Números
What You Can Get: Aggregate judiciary performance: caseload, clearance, costs, productivity, by court/segment.
Limitations: Aggregate; for case-level use DataJud.

Name: STF - Jurisprudência / Corte Aberta
What You Can Get: Search of STF acórdãos, decisions, súmulas, full text; Corte Aberta panels on distribution/decisions/repercussão geral.
Limitations: Research-oriented; not bulk structured download. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: STJ - Portal de Dados Abertos
What You Can Get: Cases in progress, full texts & metadata of terminative decisions/acórdãos, plus jurisdictional & administrative datasets.
Limitations: Check per-dataset docs; not all full history.

Name: LexML / Planalto - Legislação
What You Can Get: Federal (and some state) laws, decrees, normative acts with metadata & full text; LexML structured search.

Name: TSE - Portal de Dados Abertos
What You Can Get: Candidates & results to polling section, campaign finance (donations/expenses), electorate by municipality/zone, ballot-box logs.
Limitations: Large per-election files; migrated from old RDE in 2022.

Name: Câmara dos Deputados - Dados Abertos (API)
What You Can Get: Deputies, bills, votes, committees, speeches, parliamentary expense quota (cota) spending.

Name: Senado Federal - Dados Abertos (API)
What You Can Get: Senators, legislative matters, votings, committees, plus Siga Brasil budget link.

Name: MDS - VIS DATA 3 / Cadastro Único / Bolsa Família
What You Can Get: Cadastro Único coverage, Bolsa Família/BPC/Auxílio beneficiaries & values by municipality, SUAS network, poverty indicators.
Auth Required: None for aggregate; token for some APIs
Limitations: Individual-level CadÚnico protected; only aggregates open.

Name: MDS - Observatório do Cadastro Único
What You Can Get: Panel for CadÚnico information management and IVCAD.
Limitations: Aggregate; identified extraction needs authorization.

Name: ANEEL - Dados Abertos
What You Can Get: Generation plants, distributed generation (micro/mini), tariffs, distributors, consumption by class/region, SIGEL grid, ombudsman.
Limitations: Excellent but spread across many specialized datasets; SIGEL layers occasionally offline.

Name: ANP - Dados Abertos / CDP
API/Docs: thematic portal + CDP (Consulta de Dados Públicos)
What You Can Get: Weekly fuel-price survey by station/municipality, oil & gas production by field, reserves, derivatives sales, biofuels, E&P, incidents.
Limitations: New CDP portal (replacing legacy CPL) uses dynamic session tags; catalog spread across themes.

Name: EPE - Webmap / Balanço Energético; ONS
What You Can Get: National Energy Balance (BEN), generation/load by subsystem, reservoir levels, transmission (ONS), planning geodata (EPE).

Name: ANAC - Dados Abertos / DataSearch
What You Can Get: Air traffic by airport/route, actual flight paths (VRA), on-time performance, tariffs, dynamic ticket pricing, registered aircraft, market share.
Limitations: Some catalog needs thematic navigation; DSL query engine can be slow.

Name: ANTT - Dados Abertos / Monitriip
What You Can Get: Road freight (RNTRC)/passenger, toll & traffic, intercity bus telemetry & ticket sales (Monitriip), rail cargo, concessions, enforcement.
Limitations: Some datasets discontinued; check validity; Monitriip files are heavy.

Name: ANTAQ - Estatístico Aquaviário
What You Can Get: Port throughput & waterway statistics, anuário panels.
Limitations: Web/panel fragile; automation may need scraping. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: DNIT - Condição de Rodovias (ICM)
What You Can Get: Federal road network & condition: maintenance index (ICM), surface roughness (IRI), paving projects.
Limitations: Spatial coords occasionally misaligned with regional cartography.

Name: ANATEL - Dados Abertos / Mosaico
What You Can Get: Broadband/mobile access by municipality & technology, coverage, spectrum stations, complaints, operator market share.
Limitations: Offer dispersed across 'Dados', 'Painéis' & 'Dados Abertos'.

Name: INPI - Dados Abertos / Busca (pePI)
What You Can Get: Patents, trademarks, industrial designs, software registrations; filing stats; per-record search via pePI.
Limitations: Bulk open data limited & expanding; coverage caveats on older acervo.

Name: CNPq - Painel Lattes / Plataforma Lattes
What You Can Get: Researcher CVs (Lattes), aggregate panels by area/region/institution; research groups directory.
Limitations: No clean bulk API; scraping constraints.

Name: MJSP - SINESP / Estatísticas de Segurança Pública
What You Can Get: Homicides, robberies, vehicle theft, gender violence, weapons seizures, prison population, by state/municipality.
Limitations: State reporting heterogeneity; comparability depends on standardization.

Name: SSP-SP - Estatísticas de Criminalidade
What You Can Get: Monthly crimes against life/property, sexual violence, drug infractions, police productivity (SP).
Limitations: No API; historical data split across pages.

Name: Fórum Brasileiro de Segurança Pública - Anuário
What You Can Get: Consolidated crime/violence statistics (Anuário), often filling official gaps.
Limitations: NGO compilation, not official.

Name: Ministério do Turismo - Estatísticas e Indicadores
What You Can Get: Arrivals, tourism FX revenue/expense, financing, indicators for Brazil & abroad.
Limitations: Aggregates panels/sources; not all downloadable microdata.

Name: Ministério da Cultura - Painel PNAB (Aldir Blanc)
What You Can Get: Territorial execution of the Aldir Blanc cultural policy: repasses & monitoring.
Limitations: Program-specific; not a general culture catalog.

Name: Dados Abertos SP
What You Can Get: Unified SP state portal (Seade + secretariats); economy, health, education, security, transport.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

Name: Portal de Dados Abertos da Bahia
What You Can Get: State CKAN: finance, procurement, convênios; pair with SEI & IDE Bahia.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: Dados ES
What You Can Get: State CKAN/API: social, economic, administrative datasets; IJSN feeds.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

Name: Dados Abertos do Paraná
What You Can Get: State portal backed by BDEweb: PIB, IDH, IPDM, population, emprego, agro, finance.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

Name: Dados RS
Agency: Governo do Rio Grande do Sul
What You Can Get: State open-data portal for social reuse; quality varies by org.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

Name: Dados Abertos da Prefeitura de São Paulo
What You Can Get: PMSP CKAN: mobility, education, health, inspections, urbanism, finance.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

Name: DATA.RIO / Datalake Rio
What You Can Get: City urban/geo/social/operational data; municipal datalake integration.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

Name: Dados Abertos do Recife
What You Can Get: CKAN: health, education, environment, CTTU traffic, licenses, LAI requests.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

Name: Dados Abertos da PBH
What You Can Get: CKAN: wide variety of urban & administrative datasets.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

Name: Fortaleza Dados Abertos
What You Can Get: CKAN: hundreds of datasets - health, mobility, education, traffic, management.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

Name: Dados Abertos Curitiba
What You Can Get: 156 requests, e-Saúde, alvarás, economy, transport, municipal policies.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

Name: Dados Abertos Porto Alegre
What You Can Get: Open-government datasets on the city & administration.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

Name: Dados Abertos PMV (Vitória)
What You Can Get: Municipal open-data API (JSON) with docs; pair with Geoweb & transparência.
Limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.
